goal_results.evidence: src/be/migrations/002_one_time_schedules.sql: new migration adds scheduleType column with CHECK(scheduleType IN ('recurring','one_time')) and relaxed constraint allowing one_time without cron/interval. src/be/migrations/001_initial.sql:236-239: fresh-DB schema updated identically. Both include idx_scheduled_tasks_type index.

src/scheduler/scheduler.ts: (1) executeSchedule ~line 133-144: one_time sets enabled=false, nextRunAt=null, skips calculateNextRun. (2) recoverMissedSchedules ~line 46-55: same auto-disable for one_time. (3) runScheduleNow ~line 293-305: same auto-disable. (4) error handler ~line 189-193: sets enabled=false for one_time on error. src/http/schedules.ts ~line 191-200: trigger-now endpoint auto-disables one_time.

src/tools/schedules/create-schedule.ts: accepts scheduleType, delayMs, runAt in inputSchema. Validates one_time cannot use cron/interval, requires delayMs or runAt (not both), runAt must be future. Validates recurring cannot use delayMs/runAt, requires cron/interval. Computes nextRunAt from delayMs (Date.now()+delayMs) or runAt for one_time.

src/http/schedules.ts: POST handler validates scheduleType/delayMs/runAt with same constraints as MCP (lines 43-88). PUT handler rejects completed one_time (lines 251-261), skips cron/interval recalc for one_time (lines 295-322). src/http/stats.ts: GET supports scheduleType and hideCompleted query params (lines 84-93).

src/tools/schedules/list-schedules.ts: scheduleType and hideCompleted added to inputSchema with hideCompleted defaulting to true. Passed through to getScheduledTasks. src/be/db.ts: getScheduledTasks filters by scheduleType and applies hideCompleted filter (AND NOT (scheduleType='one_time' AND enabled=0)).

src/tools/schedules/update-schedule.ts ~lines 129-149: rejects updates on completed one_time (disabled + lastRunAt). Lines 212-240: one_time schedules skip cron/interval nextRunAt recalculation. src/http/schedules.ts ~lines 251-261 and 295-300: same guards in HTTP endpoint.

src/types.ts: ScheduledTaskSchema has scheduleType z.enum(['recurring','one_time']).default('recurring'). Refine allows one_time without cron/interval. src/be/db.ts: ScheduledTaskRow has scheduleType:string, rowToScheduledTask maps it, CreateScheduledTaskData/UpdateScheduledTaskData include scheduleType, create/update SQL includes scheduleType.

new-ui/src/api/types.ts: scheduleType added to ScheduledTask interface. new-ui/src/pages/schedules/page.tsx: Badge column with amber/emerald styling for one_time/recurring, schedule column shows execution time for one_time. new-ui/src/pages/schedules/[id]/page.tsx: Badge in detail view, timing section shows 'Executed At'/'Runs At' for one_time vs cron/interval for recurring.

judge_notes: All 8 goals met. Agent implemented the complete one-time scheduled tasks feature: migration + fresh schema (goal 1), auto-disable across all 5 execution paths (goal 2), MCP create with full validation (goal 3), HTTP API create/update/list with filters (goal 4), list-schedules MCP filtering (goal 5), update-schedule rejection of completed one-time (goal 6), types/Zod/DB layer (goal 7), and UI badges + timing display (goal 8). test.sh confirms reward=1.0 with all 8 FAIL_TO_PASS tests passing and 0 failures across 30 tests.
